title: What I think about the Ego

transcript.text: Hello. This video is what I think about the ego. Now, as far as what I understand, ego and my point of view is ego is that part of us which makes us feel, gives us our individual identity, makes us feel separate from everything else.

And I think, so I guess, Western societies are more egotistical than Eastern societies. Western societies, people would strive by me getting ahead, competition between individuals, you know, at the end one guy is, rides on top, which I guess has its place for a long time.
If you want to, it's like the, capitalism is at its best, survival if it is, making people strong and work hard and everything.
Um, but, um, I guess, I mean, I said it was mainly like Western because I, I think maybe in the Eastern, I don't remember, maybe South, maybe or something.
